Careers/Carrières

Rogue Research Inc. is currently looking for new talents (french version follows).

Production Technician

Description

Assemble and prepare electrical and/or mechanical components such as cables, connectors, enclosures, etc.
Verify and repair Printed Circuit Boards (PCB).
Execute assembly instructions, verification instructions, or calibration instructions of products and/or components.

Prerequisites

DEC or AEC in an electronic related field (or DES with some experience in electronics).
Manual skills for precision work.
Experience in surface mount soldering.
Basic knowledge of electronics.
Experience with measurement tools such as a scope, a function generator and a DVM.
Good skills with manual tools such as a screwdriver, wrenches and crimpers.
Meticulous.
Autonomous and motivated.
Bilingual (French and English).

Advantages

Stimulating work environment in the heart of Mile-Ex.
Flexibles schedules.
Free coffee.

Interested candidates should send their CV in pdf format to the following email address: cv@rogue-research.com.

Technicien.ne de Production

Rogue Research Inc. est présentement à la recherche d’un(e) Technicien(ne) de Production pour se joindre à son équipe de Production.

Description

Assembler et préparer des composants électriques et/ou mécaniques tels que des câbles, connecteurs, boitiers, etc.
Vérifier et réparer des circuits imprimés (PC
